nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Henst's goshawk
nodes.summary: Henst's goshawk（Henst's goshawk，学名 Astur henstii），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐、人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss within Madagascar

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This population is estimated to be decreasing due to deforestation and human disturbance. The species is quite sparse and elusive to most surveys and therefore accurate population measures are difficult to obtain
